title: Lesekreis - Definitionen; in der Logik und darüber hinaus
further_info: Recommended Reading Belnap, N. (1993). On rigorous definitions. Philosophical Studies: An International Journal for Philosophy in the Analytic Tradition, 72(2/3), 115-146. Gupta, A. (1988, January). Remarks on definitions and the concept of truth. In Proceedings of the Aristotelian Society (Vol. 89, pp. 227-246). Aristotelian Society, Wiley. Gupta, Anil and Stephen Mackereth, "Definitions", The Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy (Fall 2023 Edition), Edward N. Zalta & Uri Nodelman (eds.) Weiss, B. (2002). What is a theory of meaning? In Michael Dummett (pp. 9–24). chapter, Acumen Publishing. Burge, T. (1993). Concepts, definitions, and meaning. Metaphilosophy, 24(4), 309-325. Hartmann, D. (2003). On Inferring. An Enquiry into Relevance and Validity. Prior, A. N. (1960). The runabout inference-ticket. Analysis, 21(2), 38-39.Tennant, N. (1987). Anti-realism and logic: Truth as eternal. Betreuter Lesekreis; es können Leistungspunkte erworben werden
